holdings.infoBox: THNQ is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Astera Labs stock at 3.96%, Nebius Group at 3.88%, Advanced Micro Devices at 3.81%, MediaTek at 3.45%, and Credo Technology Group Holding at 3.09%.

overview.description: The ROBO Global Artificial Intelligence ETF (THNQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ROBO Global Artificial Intelligence index. The fund tracks a global index of companies involved in developing the technology and the infrastructure of enabling artificial intelligence. THNQ was launched on May 11, 2020 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
